titleStmt.title: SII 34.335: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 335. Nāṅgupaṭṭi (Maḍattukkōyil), Kulattur Taluk, Pudukkottai District. On the entrance, right side, to the first prākāra of the Maḍattukkōyil temple.

summary.p: Chōḻa, Kulōttuṅga I, 13th year, Kanyā, 7th day, Monday, Uttara-Bhādrapada = Probably A.D. 1084, September 2, Monday.

Lines 1-3 in verse in praise of Paiyūr, the patron's native place. Marudattūr-uḍaiyāṉ Kuṉṟaṉ Tiruchchiṟṟambalam-uḍaiyāṉ of Marudattūr in Kaḷattūr-kōṭṭam in Jayaṅgoṇḍachōḻa-maṇḍalam gifted some land to the temple of Tirupperumāṉāṇḍār. The land was received by the donor as a present for composing verses in praise of a Tiruchchiṟṟambalam-udaiyāṉ Vēdavaṉamuḍaiyāṉ, a uḍaiyāṉ of Paiyyūr in Uṟattūr-kūṟṟam in Vaḍa-kōnāḍu. End portion built in.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī vāḷaivayiṟu niṟaiya maṭaṟkamukam pāḷai pacuntE
nnoḻukum paiyyūrē nāḷaiyeṉṟu ceppāta vāymaiyā
n vētan tirumaṉu nūloppāneṅ kōmāṉṟanūr §
svastiśrīkOvirājakEcari panmarāṉa tiribhuvaṉac
cakkaravattikaḷ śrīkolōttuṅka cōḻatēvar
kku yāṇṭu 10 3 Āvatu Iraṭṭapāṭi ko
ṇṭa cōḻavaḷa nāṭṭu vaṭakōnāṭṭu Uṟattūr
k kūṟṟattu Uṭaiyār tirupperumāṉāṇṭār
kku jeyaṅkoṇṭa cōḻamaṇṭalattu kaḷattūr
k kōṭṭattu marutattūr marutattūruṭaiyān kuṉṟa
ṉ tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyānēṉ kanṉi nāyaṟṟu Ēḻā
ntiyatiyun tiṅkaḷk kiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Uttira
ṭṭāti nāḷ Ittirupperumāṉāṇṭār tirukkaiy malari
lēy nāṉ nīrvārtta kuṭikkāṭu Iraṭṭapāṭi koṇṭa
cōḻavaḷa nāṭṭu vaṭakōnāṭṭu Uṟattūrk kūṟṟattup
paiyyūruṭaiyān tirucciṟṟampala muṭai
yān vētavaṉamuṭaiyāṉai nān kavipāṭi pāṭiṉa kavikku Eṉak
ku paricil tanta tankāṇiyāṉa kuṭikkāṭu Irumpūtikku vaṭapāṟkellai
neṭuṅkīraikkuṭi Ellaikkut teṟkum mēlpāṟkellai mēṟpa
Ellaikku kiḻakkum tenpāṟkellai paiyyāṟ cuṭukāṭṭukkuḷa
Digital edition of SII 34.335 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
